command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup && git pull origin main

echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/rev.py
python3 /tmp/rev.py

echo ""
echo "=== GIT STATUS ==="
git diff --stat HEAD

git add docs/memory-sentinel-governance.md \
        docs/memory-runtime-architecture.md \
        docs/single-shared-reality-architecture.md

git commit -m "Phase 9E.2 Design Revisions — historical memory recovery + environment state flow"

git push origin main
git push github main

echo "=== DONE ==="
git log --oneline -3
